description: Undercut depth measurement with a bridge-cam weld gauge: V-groove butt weld macro with undercut at the right toe (visible from start), gauge straddling the weld with cam finger in the groove and 0.1mm dial reading 0.8mm, '1 mm MAX' depth limit callout, and a resolution inset comparing a 0.1mm gauge scale (check) vs a whole-mm rule (X).
